tier2_candidates.snippet: Citigroup’s stock was rallying, bucking the postearnings weakness seen in shares of its big-bank peers.

tier2_candidates.headline: United Airlines reportedly pitched government on American Airlines deal. Its CEO wants to take advantage of high oil prices.
tier2_candidates.snippet: A published report says that United Airlines has pitched senior government officials on whether it could get permission to merge with American Airlines, a transaction that if completed would lead to carrier controlling a third of the market.

tier2_candidates.headline: BP sees ‘exceptional’ oil-trading result as prices spike
tier2_candidates.snippet: The British oil company expects significantly better performance in oil trading this quarter compared with the previous one.

tier2_candidates.headline: Why two Wall Street titans just turned bullish on U.S. stocks
tier2_candidates.snippet: Citigroup and BlackRock Investment Institute have both turned bullish on U.S. stocks. They say tech dominance is a part of that.
